ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the visitor */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages visited */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits (requests) */,
  "bandwidth" REAL /* Bandwidth used by the visitor */,
  "last_visit" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last visit */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the visitor */,
  "referrer" TEXT /* URL of the page that linked to the current page */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the visitor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the visitor */,
  "is_bot" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the visitor is a bot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ip_address")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitors" (
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visitor */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the visitor */,
  "first_visit" TEXT /* Timestamp of the first visit */,
  "last_visit" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last visit */,
  "visit_count" INTEGER /* Total number of visits */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the visitor */,
  "referrer" TEXT /* Referrer URL for the first visit */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the visitor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the visitor */,
  "is_bot" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the visitor is a bot */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitors_ip_address FOREIGN KEY ("ip_address") REFERENCES traffic_data ("ip_address")
)

CREATE TABLE "pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the page */,
  "visit_count" INTEGER /* Number of visits to the page */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the page */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the page */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the page */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hits" (
  "hit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hit */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor who made the hit */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page that was hit */,
  "hit_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the hit */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the hit */,
  "referrer" TEXT /* Referrer URL for the hit */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the visitor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the visitor */,
  "is_bot" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the hit is from a bot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bandwidth_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bandwidth usage entry */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor */,
  "bandwidth" REAL /* Amount of bandwidth used */,
  "usage_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the bandwidth usage */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the visitor */,
  "referrer" TEXT /* Referrer URL for the bandwidth usage */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the visitor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the visitor */,
  "is_bot" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the bandwidth usage is from a bot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bandwidth_usage_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security log entry */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address associated with the security threat */,
  "threat_level" INTEGER /* Level of threat (1-10) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threat or unusual pattern */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the visitor */,
  "referrer" TEXT /* Referrer URL for the security log entry */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the visitor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the visitor */,
  "is_bot" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the security log entry is from a bot */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken in response to the threat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_logs_ip_address FOREIGN KEY ("ip_address") REFERENCES traffic_data ("ip_address")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the client's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the client */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the client */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the report is for */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "generation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL where the report can be accessed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the report period */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the report period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)
